title: Senior Software Engineer - KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
